strategies.description: Pattern around 'coding': 390 lessons share this theme. Example: Claude-3.5-Sonnet is the most reliable model for medium-complexity coding and reasoning tasks.
Pattern around 'tasks': 251 lessons share this theme. Example: Gemini-2.5-flash is a cost-effective choice for trivial tasks, but performance varies on medium-complexity tasks.
Pattern around 'choice': 283 lessons share this theme. Example: For summarization:easy tasks, gemini-2.5-flash is a reliable, cost-effective choice (verified in production at ~100% qua...
Pattern around 'classification': 24 lessons share this theme. Example: Gemini-2.5-Flash is a cost-effective choice for trivial classification, extraction, and translation tasks.
Pattern around 'complex': 12 lessons share this theme. Example: gpt-4o-mini demonstrates superior consistency for complex coding tasks and data structure implementations.
